title: randomrespawn
description: whenever you die, you will respawn up to 5000 blocks away from spawn!
body:
makes you respawn somewhere random 5000 blocks away when dying


# Why would I use this?
if you want a more difficult survival experience. 
like hardcore, but you can still respawn, it feels like a new world, but you will maybe find your old "world"




its still in very early beta so it may not be that good optimized or fast
